title: Declarative API Validation — +k8s:subfield
text:
Description:
Declares a validation for a subfield of a struct.
Stability Level:
Beta
Arguments:
<field-json-name>
(string, required): The JSON name of the subfield.
Payload:
<validation-tag>
: The tag to evaluate for the subfield.
Usage Example:
type
MyStruct
struct
{
// +k8s:subfield("mySubfield")=+k8s:required
MyStruct
MyStruct
`json:"MyStruct"`
}
type
MyStruct
struct
{
MySubfield
string
`json:"mySubfield"`
}
In this example,
MySubfield
within
MyStruct
is required.
